data.name: WorkItemExtensionRegistered
data.value: Registered WorkItem extension type {0} for WorkItem type {1}.

data.name: TraceWorkItemRunStarted
data.value: WorkItem {0} Run method has started.

data.name: SolutionProfileNotFound
data.value: Catalog file at location {0} could not be found.

data.name: InvalidPublicationScope
data.value: The value for the PublicationScope is invalid.

data.name: TraceWorkItemRun
data.value: The work item {0} has been run.

data.name: WorkItemExtensionTypeAlreadyRegistered
data.value: The WorkItem Extension type {0} is already registered for WorkItem type {1}.

data.name: WorkItemTerminated
data.value: WorkItem has already been disposed or terminated.

data.name: NamedObjectNotFound
data.value: Объект "{0}" не найден

data.name: InvalidSolutionProfileXml
data.value: There is an error in the XML document. <{0} xmlns='{1}'> was not expected.

data.name: BackgroundSubscriberException
data.value: An exception thrown in a background subscriber was not handled. The exception was {0}.

data.name: EventTopicTracePublicationAdded
data.value: Publication for the EventTopic {0} was added for the event {1} on the type {2}.

data.name: ReferencedAssemblyNotFound
data.value: The ModuleLoaderService cannot initialize the module because some of their dependencies are not present. Make sure to deploy all the assemblies needed to execute the module.

data.name: VisualizerAlreadyInitialized
data.value: The visualizer has already been initialized.

data.name: CommandInjectionTearDown
data.value: Removing command handler from {0} for command '{1}'

data.name: DuplicateService
data.value: A service of this type already exists: {0}.

data.name: StaticPublisherNotAllowed
data.value: Registering static event {0} as topic publication is not allowed.

data.name: EventTopicTraceFireCompleted
data.value: EventTopic {0} fire completed.

data.name: StringCannotBeEmpty
data.value: The provided String argument {0} must not be empty.

data.name: ModuleNotFound
data.value: Assembly file {0} was not found.

data.name: ProfileNotFoundInCatalog
data.value: Profile {0} was not found in the catalog.

data.name: EventCommandAdapterInvokerNotType
data.value: Invoker is not of type {0}

data.name: DuplicateUIExtensionSite
data.value: A UI extension site with this name already exists: {0}

data.name: ErrorReadingProfile
data.value: An error occurred while reading the solution profile {0}.

data.name: DuplicateID
data.value: An object with this ID already exists: {0}.

data.name: CannotRegisterStaticSubscriptionMethods
data.value: Subscription {0}.{1} is static and is not supported.

data.name: EventTopicTraceFireExceptions
data.value: Exceptions occurred while firing the EventTopic {0}.

data.name: LogModuleAssemblyLoaded
data.value: Loaded assembly file {0} for Module.

data.name: NamedServiceNotFound
data.value: Служба "{0}" не найдена

data.name: InvalidAdapter
data.value: The adapter type is not a ICommandAdapter.

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusActivating
data.value: The work item {0} is Activating.

data.name: TypeNotCompatible
data.value: The provided type {0} is not compatible with {1}.

data.name: FailedToLoadModule
data.value: Failed to load module from assembly {0}. Error was: {1}

data.name: ServiceMissingExceptionSimpleMessage
data.value: Service {0} is not available in the current context.

data.name: ErrorEnumeratingModules
data.value: An exception occurred while enumerating the modules using the {0} enumerator.

data.name: InvalidCatalogXml
data.value: There is an error in the XML document. <{0} xmlns='{1}'> was not expected.

data.name: ModulePathNotUnderRoot
data.value: Assembly path {0} does not fall under the current application root.

data.name: ModuleStartCalled
data.value: Load() method called for Module {0}.

data.name: ConfigurationProviderMustBeUserScoped
data.value: Settings must be user-scoped in order to use the selected provider.

data.name: CannotLoadState
data.value: An error occurred while loading the state with id {0} from the storage.

data.name: OnlyOnePublicationIsAllowed
data.value: Cannot add more than one instance of the same publisher to one topic.

data.name: ReadProfileException
data.value: An exception occurred while reading the profile.

data.name: NoRemoveWorkItemFromManagedObjectCollection
data.value: Removing WorkItems is not permitted. Use WorkItem.Terminate or WorkItem.Dispose to clean up a WorkItem.

data.name: CannotSaveState
data.value: An error occurred while saving the state with id {0} to the storage.

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusChangedToActivated
data.value: The work item {0} is Activated.

data.name: InvalidEnumValue
data.value: The value of the argument {0} provided for the enumeration {1} is invalid.

data.name: StateDoesNotExist
data.value: There is no state persisted with the given id {0}.

data.name: InvalidCryptographyValue
data.value: The UseCryptography setting must be set to a valid boolean value.

data.name: WorkItemDesignerCodeWarning
data.value: Do not modify this method, changes will be lost upon regeneration by the designer.

data.name: CommandInjectionBuildUp
data.value: Adding command handler on {0} for command '{1}'

data.name: InvalidStateStream
data.value: State stream from storage is invalid.

data.name: InvalidFileCatalogFilePath
data.value: Catalog file path cannot be empty or null, and must be a local file under the application folder.

data.name: RemoveCommandFromWorkItemIsNotPermitted
data.value: Removing Commands from WorkItem is not permitted. An attempt was made to remove the command {0}.

data.name: CannotUnregisterSiteRegisteredWithParent
data.value: Cannot unregister site that was registered in parent: {0}

data.name: DictionaryIsReadOnly
data.value: The dictionary is readonly and can not be modified.

data.name: SmartPartNotInWorkspace
data.value: The smartpart is not present in the workspace.

data.name: EventTopicTraceFireStarted
data.value: Firing EventTopic {0}

data.name: EventTopicFireException
data.value: One or more exceptions occurred while firing the topic '{0}'

data.name: WorkItemExtensionInitialized
data.value: Initialized WorkItem extension {0} with WorkItem {1}.

data.name: NullSolutionProfileReaderReturned
data.value: The ModuleEnumerator implementation {0} returned a null reader for the catalog.

data.name: CannotGetCommandAdapter
data.value: The Command {0} cannot get an adapter for the type "{1}"

data.name: DuplicatedModule
data.value: A duplicated module with name {0} has been found by the loader.

data.name: ExtensionSiteDoesNotExist
data.value: Extension site does not exist: {0}

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusTerminating
data.value: The work item {0} is Terminating.

data.name: ServiceMissingExceptionMessage
data.value: Service {0}, required for component {1} is not available in the current context.

data.name: SubscriberHandlerNotFound
data.value: The specified method handler {0} is not present or accessible on the subscriber type {1}.

data.name: ServiceAddedOnDemand
data.value: Service {1} will be added on demand for Module {0}.

data.name: EventTopicTraceSubscriptionRemoved
data.value: Subscription on EventTopic {0} removed for the method {1} on the type {2}

data.name: EventTopicTraceSubscriptionAdded
data.value: Subscription for EventTopic {0} added for the method {1} on the type {2}

data.name: DependencyForUnknownModule
data.value: Cannot add dependency for unknown module '{0}'; call AddModule() before AddDependency()

data.name: EventNotPresentOnInvoker
data.value: The event {0} on the invoker {1} is not present.

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusChangedToInitialized
data.value: The work item {0} is Initialized.

data.name: ServiceLocatorNotInitialized
data.value: Менеджер служб не инициализирован

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusChangedToDisposed
data.value: The work item {0} is Disposed.

data.name: ServiceAdded
data.value: Service {1} added for Module {0}.

data.name: WorkItemExtensionRootRegistered
data.value: Registered WorkItem extension type {0} for root WorkItem.

data.name: VisualizerMustImplementIVisualizer
data.value: Visualizer type must implement IVisualizer.

data.name: InvalidSolutionProfilePath
data.value: Catalog file path {0} is not a local file under the application folder {1}.

data.name: CannotFindPublishedEvent
data.value: The specified event {0} was not found in the publisher.

data.name: InvalidIsolatedStorageStatePersistanceScope
data.value: Scope value {0} is invalid. {1} does not exist in the IsolatedStorageScope enumeration.

data.name: SmartPartMustImplementISmartPartInfoProvider
data.value: Implement ISmartPartInfoProvider in the containing smart part. Required in order for contained smart part infos to work.

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusChangedToTerminated
data.value: The work item {0} is Terminated.

data.name: ServiceNotFound
data.value: Служба не найдена

data.name: DependencyOnMissingModule
data.value: A module declared a dependency on another module which is not declared to be loaded. Missing module(s): {0}

data.name: ProfileNotFound
data.value: Profile {0} was not found in the catalog.

data.name: InvalidSubscriptionSignature
data.value: Subscription method {0}.{1} must have a signature receiving an object and an EventArgs parameter (EventHandler or EventHandler<T> delegates signature).

data.name: InvalidPublicationSignature
data.value: Publication event {0}.{1} must have a delegate type compatible with EventHandler or EventHandler<T>.

data.name: AddServicesCalled
data.value: AddServices() method called for Module {0}.

data.name: NoRegisteredUIElementFactory
data.value: No UIElementAdapterFactory register for type {0}.

data.name: UnsupportedSmartPartType
data.value: Smart part type {0} is not supported. Expected {1} or a compatible type.

data.name: StaticCommandPublisherNotSupported
data.value: Static command publisher "{0}" is not supported.

data.name: ConfigurationProviderNotSupportLocation
data.value: This provider only supports settings classes defined in assemblies deployed locally.

data.name: AutogeneratedCodeWarning
data.value: This code is required by the smart part informations.

data.name: NamedObjectWithIdNotFound
data.value: Объект "{0}" с идентификатором {1} не найден

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusChangedToDeactivated
data.value: The work item {0} is Deactivated.

data.name: RemoveEventTopicFromWorkItemIsNotPermitted
data.value: Removing EventTopic from WorkItem is not permitted. An attempt was made to remove the EventTopic {0}.

data.name: CannotGetMapService
data.value: The Command "{0}" does not have access to the IAdapterMapService to perform the AddInvoker operation.

data.name: ConfigurationAttributeOnValueWithIncompatibleType
data.value: Property marked as configuration property is not valid as its type {0} does not inherit from ApplicationSettingsBase.

data.name: UIElementNotCorrectType
data.value: UI element must be a {0}

data.name: NullReaderReturned
data.value: Service implementation {0} returned a null reader for the catalog.

data.name: TraceCommandExecuted
data.value: The Command {0} has been executed.

data.name: LogModuleAdded
data.value: Module {0} added to the container.

data.name: DefaultProfileNotSpecified
data.value: No default profile has been specified.

data.name: TraceWorkItemStatusDeactivating
data.value: The work item {0} is Deactivating.

data.name: TraceStateChangedMessage
data.value: The state with ID {0} has changed. The changed value was {1}.

data.name: EventTopicTracePublicationRemoved
data.value: Publication removed from EventTopic {0} for the event {1} on the type {2}

data.name: CannotAddWorkItemToItself
data.value: A WorkItem cannot be added to itself.

data.name: InvalidIsolatedStorageStatePersistanceParsedScope
data.value: Cannot open an isolated store with scope {0}. Check the IsolatedStorageFile documentation for the valid combination of values.

data.name: StaticCommandHandlerNotSupported
data.value: Static command handler "{0}" is not supported.

data.name: AdapterAlreadyBoundToACommand
data.value: Command adapter has already been bound to a command.

data.name: TraceCommandStatusChanged
data.value: Command status for command {0} has changed to {1}.

data.name: ObjectNotFound
data.value: Объект не найден

data.name: AdapterNotBoundToGivenCommand
data.value: The adapter has not been previously bound to the command.

data.name: InvalidConfigurationSectionType
data.value: Configuration section {0} must be of type {1}.
